info.title: MySQL Server Distributed Cache Command Line Tool

commands.name: create
commands.description:
Command line tool to create tables and indexes in a MySQL Server database for distributed caching.
Use "mysql-distributed-cache [command] --help" for more information about a command.

options.name: --force
options.description: Force to create the table (if the table is already exist will remove it)

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show help information
Example usage:
mysql-distributed-cache create Server=example.com;Database=db;User=myUser;Password=mySecret; myTableName

arguments.name: CONNECTIONSTRING
arguments.description: The mysql connection string to connect to the database.

arguments.name: TABLENAME
arguments.description: Name of the table to be created.
